overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character with braided hair and red arm markings walking through a rocky coastal landscape during golden hour. The character navigates grassy terrain and rocky outcrops along a cliff edge overlooking the ocean with dramatic sea stacks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy coastal approach with scattered rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a grassy path toward the coastline, navigating around scattered rocks

entered.detail: large weathered rock outcrops scattered across the coastal landscape
golden-brown grass covering the ground along the path
hazy ocean visible in the distance with bright sunlight glare
tall wooden post stuck in the ground near the path
moss-covered boulder formation on the left side of the path
moss-covered boulder formation on the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the grass and rocks

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassy coastal area with scattered rocks, approaching the coastline. The sun creates a warm golden glow and lens flare as the character moves along a dirt path toward a narrow passage between large boulders.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky passage between large boulders leading to cliff edge

events.description: character passes between large rock formations, entering shadowed area
emerging from rocky passage to open cliff edge with ocean view

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow passage between large mossy boulders, then emerging onto the open cliff edge

entered.detail: tall rock pillars rising from the ocean water
steep drop-off leading down to the ocean
dark ocean water visible below the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow shadowed passage between large rock formations, experiencing a lighting shift, then emerges onto the open cliff edge where towering sea stacks become visible in the ocean below.

scene_state.functional_zone: high cliff edge overlooking ocean with prominent sea stacks

events.description: character slows and stops briefly to look down at ocean waves crashing against the cliffs
character resumes walking along the cliff edge toward the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge, pausing to look down at the waves crashing against the rocks below, then continuing along the coastal path

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff wall dropping down to the water
white foam patterns from waves hitting the rocks below
rocky cliffs extending into the distance along the coast

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the dramatic cliff edge overlooking the ocean, with large sea stacks rising from the water to the left. The camera pans to show the waves crashing against the cliffs below as the character explores the coastline, moving from a frontal view of the ocean to looking down at the water directly below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched coastal meadow into a shadowed rocky corridor that eventually opens onto a dramatic cliffside overlook. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path through open grassy terrain, where the low sun creates a warm golden glow and frequent lens flares. As the character approaches the coastline, the scene shifts into a narrow, shadowed passage between towering boulders, momentarily dimming the light before emerging back into the brightness of the cliff edge. The view then expands to reveal massive sea stacks rising from the ocean below, with the camera panning from the distant horizon to the crashing waves directly beneath the precipice. Finally, the movement follows the character as they explore the rugged perimeter of the coastline, transitioning from a frontal vista of the sea to a steep downward perspective of the water.
